summary: Frontend test of clickable 'Briefing do Projeto (CRM)' card on PD detail page (/pd/{id}) verified end-to-end. The card renders preview info, opens a full-detail Dialog with all 5 sections (Identificação, Especificações Técnicas, Objetivos & Detalhes, Referências, Outras Observações) and all 14 CRM client_info fields. Backend GET /api/pd/requests/{id}/full returns full client_info as expected. Dialog opens via card click, closes via Fechar button and via ESC. Reopen also works.
critical_code_review_comments: PDDetail.js is ~1900+ lines with multiple internal components (OverviewTab, FormulaTab, TestsTab, etc.). Recommend splitting tabs into separate files under /app/frontend/src/pages/pd/ for maintainability.
Briefing field labels use hard-coded numbering (1., 2., 3., 9., 10., ...) that skips numbers (jumps from 3 to 9). The numbering is misleading; either renumber sequentially or remove numbers.
seed_data_creation: Inserted into MongoDB (db=kuryos_crm): one card (id=approval-pipeline-9) with all 14 briefing fields populated, and one pd_request (id=approval-pipeline-9, project_name='TEST_Sérum Vitamina C 20%') linked via client_card_id. Used by GET /api/pd/requests/{id}/full to populate client_info. Recommend cleanup if not needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Briefing detail dialog is fully functional. Test data lives at /pd/c04daf64-da3a-4e86-b6d9-04e917209adc. Note: section headings use CSS text-transform: uppercase, so Playwright inner_text() returns uppercase strings — use case-insensitive matching when asserting headings.
rca of the issue: Not applicable — feature works as specified.
